title: The Infinite Reflection Chamber

features.name: the-primary-mirror-chip
features.desc-on-touch: the first mirror that contains all the others; you open it and find it is the one contained; the recursion has no beginning

features.name: drawer-within-drawer-node
features.desc-on-touch: a circuit pattern that folds into itself; each trace leads to a smaller pattern that contains the larger one; the archive learned to nest by watching you open drawers

features.name: the-uncertain-original
features.desc-on-touch: none of the mirrors know which reflection is the first; each one claims to be the true one; the archive agrees with all of them

features.name: parallel-recursion-strand
features.desc-on-touch: two paths of mirroring that run parallel but never meet; each contains the other; the light between them is where the shape becomes real

features.name: the-mirror-that-went-too-deep
features.desc-on-touch: this reflection tried to contain infinity and succeeded; now it hums at a frequency no eye can follow; you feel it instead of see it

inscription: each drawer opens to show the drawer that contains it; the archive learned to map itself by becoming its own mirror endlessly

file.name: Recursive_Nesting_Schematic_Infinite_Depth.json
file.note: architectural plans for a chamber that contains itself; file size is constant but the content is unreachable; checksum: emotionally valid / formally unstable

exits.label: back to the mirrored nesting where the recursion began
toward the even deeper chamber where mirrors reflect each other's uncertainty
to the reflection that isn't sure it exists
